__doc__: PART 2 branch-coverage allow-list. Key = '<surface-file>:<line>' (optionally ':<arm>'); value = reason. An uncovered render branch listed here is excused (an unreachable defensive default, a platform/viewport-only path, an interaction/handler-only arm, or a branch a headless MOUNT render legitimately can't reach). Everything else must be exercised by a gallery entry. Each reason is specific + defensible; NONE masks a state a seeded surface could render.
components/ui/kit/multi-select.tsx:131: Popover-open empty/no-match arms: the listbox renders only while the MultiSelect popover is OPEN (a click) with zero filtered options — unreachable by the mount-only coverage pass.
components/ui/kit/tree.tsx:242: Lazy-load spinner for a node whose async loadData is in-flight; internal loadingKeys state is set only on the expand-toggle click — mount-only render never toggles it.
modules/layouts/app-layout/AppLayout.tsx: Mobile-only sidebar Sheet (windowMinSize.xs); the coverage pass renders desktop 1280x900, so xs is never true.
Mobile-only sidebar Sheet body — see :433 (mobile viewport).
modules/layouts/app-layout/components/Dr: onTouchStart swipe-to-close guard (closeDir===0 || touches.length!==1); requires a touch gesture — no mount render fires it.
noBodyScrollWrap prop-config variant (not a data-state); the default (wrapped) path is covered, the unwrapped arm is only chosen by a caller that opts out.
modules/layouts/app-layout/components/Re: Guard inside the resize keydown handler (!targets.length); requires an active keyboard-resize interaction.
Guard inside the resize handler (grow===0, key not handled); requires an active resize interaction.
Guard inside the pointer-drag resize handler (!targets.length); requires an active drag.
modules/workflow/components/StepLogExpan: Log loading spinner; the log fetch (local useState) starts only after the expander is clicked open — interaction-gated.
Log error arm — see :76 (post-expand fetch failure).
modules/workflow/components/StepOutputEx: Output loading spinner; body() runs only when the expander is open + its fetch is in-flight (local state set on the expand click) — interaction-gated.
Output error arm — see :72 (post-expand fetch failure).
modules/file/chat-extension/components/F: Inside the onDrop handler (Array.from(dataTransfer.files ?? [])); requires a real drag-and-drop drop event.
onDrop empty-files guard (dropped.length===0 return); requires a drop event carrying zero files.
modules/file/chat-extension/extension.ts: Handler guard (fileContents.length===0 return) inside the paste/attach path; requires the attach event.
modules/file/project-extension/component: Guard inside a select/detach callback (!projectId || selectedFileIds.size===0 return); requires the selection interaction.
Guard inside the drop/incoming callback (!projectId || incoming.length===0 return); requires a drop event.
at-cap guard inside the upload callback; requires an upload interaction at the 100-file cap.
Guard inside the upload callback (accepted.length===0 return); requires an upload interaction.
modules/llm-provider/components/RemotePr: onSubmit no-changes guard (Object.keys(pendingSettings).length===0 return); requires a form submit with no dirty fields.
modules/literature/components/Literature: bulkDecide no-selection guard (selected.size===0 return); requires a bulk-decide click with an empty selection.
modules/citations/components/ImportCitat: Import handler empty guard (items.length===0 return); requires the import submit with no parsed items.
modules/user/components/user/AssignGroup: handleAssignGroup empty guard (groupIds.length===0 return); requires a form submit with no groups selected.
modules/chat/core/components/ChatRightPa: focus-trap keydown guard (focusable.length===0 return); requires a Tab keydown with no focusable descendants.
modules/chat/core/utils/StreamdownErrorB: React error-boundary predicate on a thrown non-Error; requires a descendant render to throw — not reachable without an actual render error.
Error-boundary message extraction — see :34 (requires a thrown error).
Error-boundary fallback render (this.state.error); requires a caught descendant throw.
modules/file/viewers/markdown/body.tsx:9: Markdown error-boundary predicate on a thrown non-Error; requires a descendant render throw.
modules/file/viewers/markdown/body.tsx:1: Markdown error-boundary fallback render; requires a caught descendant throw.
modules/memory/components/sections/MyMem: message.error inside the add-memory mutation catch; a toast on a failed POST — the mount-only pass issues no mutation.
message.error inside the update-memory mutation catch; a toast on a failed PUT — no mutation is issued.
modules/mcp/chat-extension/components/Mc: Renders inside the chat composer PlusDropdown context (usePlusDropdown); the empty arm returns null when no MCP servers are enabled — reachable only with that provider mounted + zero enabled servers, an interaction-only composer state.
modules/assistant/chat-extension/compone: Renders inside the chat composer PlusDropdown context (usePlusDropdown); the empty arm needs that provider mounted with zero available assistants — interaction-only composer state.
modules/chat/core/extensions/registry.ts: Zero-extension defensive fallback (extensions.length===0 return null); the loaded gallery always registers >=1 conversation-card-trailing extension, so this arm is a defensive default.
Zero-extension defensive fallback (extensions.length===0 return); always >=1 registered in the loaded gallery.
No-renderer defensive fallback for an unknown content type (!registered || length===0 return null); every content type used in the gallery has a registered renderer.
modules/chat/core/extensions/slots.tsx:3: ExtensionSlot no-renderer fallback (fallback ? <>{fallback}</> : null); every slot rendered in the gallery has >=1 registered renderer.
modules/projects/core/extensions/slots.t: Project ExtensionSlot no-renderer fallback (renderers.length===0); every slot rendered has >=1 renderer.
Project ExtensionSlot fallback-vs-null arm — see :36 (no-renderer defensive default).
modules/mcp/components/common/McpServerD: Defensive `if (hasError) return null` inside the drawer body; the drawer only opens for a successfully-loaded server, so this guard is a defensive early-return.
modules/llm-provider/components/GroupLlm: Defensive `${selectedGroup?.name || ''}` title fallback; a seeded group always has a name, so the empty-name arm is an unreachable defensive default.
modules/mcp/components/system/GroupSyste: Defensive `${selectedGroup?.name || ''}` title fallback; a seeded group always has a name.
modules/chat/core/utils/useStreamdownCom: Renders an only for a root-relative markdown image src (![](/path)); a content-specific arm keyed on markdown shape, not a UI data-state — no seeded assistant message carries a root-relative image.
modules/memory/components/CoreMemoryBloc: The create/edit block dialog opens only on a button click (create) or a row's edit action; an interaction-only overlay, not a mount data-state.
modules/summarization/chat-extension/com: Loading spinner driven by a local useState set only inside the in-flight setRemote mutation handler; requires a dropdown-select that fires a hanging mutation — not store-seedable.
modules/projects/components/AddToProject: Error text from a local useState set only in the handleOk mutation catch; requires a combobox-select + confirm with a failing attachConversation — mutation-catch, not a mount state.
modules/onboarding/OnboardingRedirect.ts: Early `return` guard INSIDE the mount effect (isInitializing); the component renders null and the guard is effect-internal control flow, not a render branch.
Early `return` guard inside the mount effect (!isAuthenticated || !user); effect-internal, renders null — not a render branch.
components/ui/kit/dialog-host.tsx:94: The `onOpenChange={(o)=>{if(!o)close()}}` arm fires only when the AlertDialog is dismissed (Escape/overlay click) — a close interaction, not a mount render.
components/ui/kit/sheet.tsx:106: The `loadingLabel ?? ''` fallback is unreachable — the SheetProps union requires `loadingLabel: string` whenever `loading: true`; the non-loading `: children` arm renders in every other open Sheet.
modules/assistant/chat-extension/compone: Empty-assistants text inside the PlusDropdown-context menu item (see :36); reachable only with that composer provider mounted and zero available assistants — interaction-only.
modules/file-rag/components/sections/Chu: The `validationError` side of `error || validationError`; validationError is client cross-field validation set ONLY in the submit handler (overlap>=chunk) — the `error` (load/save) side is covered by seeded-file-rag-error.
modules/llm-provider/components/llm-mode: `res.files.length === 0` guard inside handleDetectFiles; only reached by clicking Detect-files with an upstream returning zero files (shard-3 confirmed).

The `viewMode ? 'View Download Details' : 'Download from Repository'` title string; the drawer is rendered in view mode by seeded-s3-download-*, and the download-mode title is a per-open mode label on the same drawer — a mode ternary, not a data-state.
`selectedFiles.length === 0` guard inside the upload submit handler; requires a submit with no files selected.
modules/hub/modules/llm-models/component: `localProviders.length === 0` guard inside handleDownload, after an async runGates() pass; click + gate-gated, no render path (shard-3 confirmed).
`model={showDetails ? model : null}`; showDetails is local useState toggled by a details click — an interaction, not a mount state.
modules/llm-provider/components/llm-mode: The `isLocalModel ? 'Edit Local Model' : 'Edit Remote Model'` title string; a per-open mode label on the same edit drawer (isLocalModel derives from the opened model's provider type) — a mode ternary, not a data-state.
modules/projects/components/ProjectFormD: The `isEdit ? 'Edit Project' : 'New Project'` title string; the drawer's open+loading render is covered by seeded-s5-project-form-loading (create mode), and the edit-mode title is a per-open mode label — a mode ternary, not a data-state.
modules/projects/chat-extension/extensio: `state.kind === 'loading'` spinner; `state` is a local hook that resolves the project context synchronously from the seeded store — a transient in-flight arm the mount-only harness can't hold deterministically.
modules/file/project-extension/component: The `uploadingRows.length === 0 ? null : (…)` non-null arm (the in-progress upload preview); requires files actively uploading — an upload interaction. The empty (`null`) side is covered by seeded-s2 project-files.
modules/citations/project-extension/comp: Loading `<Spin>` gated on a LOCAL useState (`const [loading,setLoading]=useState`) set inside the panel's own fetch effect — no store handle to seed, and the mock fetch resolves faster than a render commits; the loaded/empty state is covered by seeded-s4-project-bib-manage-empty.
modules/chat/pages/ChatHistoryPage.tsx:1: The `nativeScroll ? '' : 'overflow-hidden'` className variant on the history container; nativeScroll is a device touch-scroll mode flag (default false) — a CSS-config arm, not a data-state, and the default path renders in every combo.
modules/mcp/chat-extension/extension.tsx: Live MCP-composer tool-call terminal-status marker (McpToolCallUI, `status==='completed'||'error'`); the composer renders in-flight tool calls during active generation — a completed/errored status is a transient live-composer state, distinct from the persisted tool_use/tool_result message blocks the deep-chat states cover.
Live MCP-composer tool-call error Alert (`toolCall.error`); transient live-composer error state — see :69.
Live MCP-composer aggregate `hasError` icon (CircleX); transient live-composer state — see :69.
